=========================

   Knapsack problem

Module Contents
---------------

.. py:data:: jnp
   :value: None


.. py:class:: knapsackModel(weights: numpy.ndarray | list, capacity: numpy.ndarray | list, *args, **kwargs)

   Bases: :py:obj:`pyepo.model.bases.knapsackBase`, :py:obj:`pyepo.model.mpax.mpaxmodel.optMpaxModel`


   MPAX-backed (JAX LP) knapsack — LP relaxation.

   :ivar _model: MPAX model
   :ivar weights: Weights of items
   :vartype weights: np.ndarray
   :ivar capacity: Total capacity
   :vartype capacity: np.ndarray
   :ivar items: List of item index

   :vartype items: list


   .. py:attribute:: use_sparse_matrix
      :value: False
